title: PAUDIN Carving Knife 10 Inch, High Carbon Stainless Steel Slicing Knife, Kitchen Knife with Pakkawood Handle, Gift for Family and Friend
features: Design for Carving: The Granton design on the slicing knife effectively reduces the contact area between food and knife, preventing food from sticking. 10-inch long carving knife with curved blade for smoother cuts, helping to easily cut through flesh, fat, and even bones.

Premium German Steel: The brisket knife is forged from high-strength 5Cr15Mov steel, ensuring exceptional sharpness. With a hardness of HRC 56, it combines durability with excellent toughness.The kitchen knife is rust-proof and has corrosion resistance, contributing to its extended service life.

Comfortable and Durable Handle: The handle of this slicing knife is made from strong Pakkawood. It has a smooth surface that feels comfortable in your hand. The handle won't crack or grow mold, keeping your hands and food safe. It's also waterproof, so it won't soak up water and swell or change shape.

Ergonomic Design: The handle is designed in accordance with ergonomic principles and fits the curve of the hand, ensuring a natural posture during use and reducing hand pressure, making it very suitable for long-time cutting.

Meet All Your Needs: The Sharp Carving Knife perfect for cutting roasts, brisket, ham, turkey, watermelon.It comes in a beautiful package and is a great gift for home chefs and professional chefs. If you have any questions after receiving the product, please feel free to contact us!
description: Product Description The 10 inch carving knife is built for tough tasks like cutting, trimming, and processing large cuts of meat with ease. The stainless steel tapered blade design enhances hardness, flexibility, and minimizes slicing resistance for effortless cutting. This brisket trimming knife not only has an extremely sharp blade that can easily penetrate all kinds of meat, but also has a unique blade curve that reduces resistance and friction during cutting, making each cut precise.
